metadata.description: A memory module (DIMM) component. The first-class entity form of the §26 component model — a parent (e.g. Compute.BareMetalHost) carries the memory rollup and MAY also contain Hardware.MemoryModule entities. device_class distinguishes a physical DIMM from virtual guest memory.

device_class.description: Device realization (common-elements.md §7). physical = a real DIMM; virtual = guest memory.

partition_mechanism.description: Only when device_class=partition: the slicing mechanism. Rare for memory.

location.description: DIMM slot within the parent, e.g. P1-DIMMA1 (Redfish DeviceLocator). Primary discriminator.

memory_type.description: Technology, e.g. DDR4, DDR5, NVDIMM (Redfish MemoryDeviceType).

relationships.description: The host this module is installed in; the parent carries the reconciled memory rollup (§26).
For device_class=virtual, the guest the memory is presented to.

adopts.role: memory component vocabulary (capacity, type, speed, locator, serial)
